Index

A C E G M N P S 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

AlertSystem - Class in Unnamed Package
Container class that manages notification delivery through composition.
AlertSystem() - Constructor for class AlertSystem
Constructs a new AlertSystem with no initial medium.
AlertSystem(NotificationMedium) - Constructor for class AlertSystem
Constructs a new AlertSystem with an initial notification medium.

C

clearLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
Clears the message and timestamp logs.

E

EmailService - Class in Unnamed Package
Concrete implementation of NotificationMedium for email delivery.
EmailService() - Constructor for class EmailService
Constructs a new EmailService with default configuration.
EmailService(String, String) - Constructor for class EmailService
Constructs a new EmailService with custom SMTP configuration.

G

getApiKey() - Method in class SMSService
Returns the API key (masked for security).
getGatewayUrl() - Method in class SMSService
Returns the SMS gateway URL.
getMessageCount() - Method in class AlertSystem
Returns the number of messages sent in this session.
getMessageLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
Returns the message log for this session.
getSenderEmail() - Method in class EmailService
Returns the sender email address.
getSenderPhone() - Method in class SMSService
Returns the sender phone number.
getSmtpServer() - Method in class EmailService
Returns the SMTP server configuration.
getTimestampLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
Returns the timestamp log corresponding to each message.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class AlertSystem
Main method for CLI execution.

N

NotificationMedium - Interface in Unnamed Package
Interface defining the contract for notification delivery mechanisms.
notifyUser(String) - Method in class AlertSystem
Sends a notification message using the currently configured medium.

P

printLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
Prints the session log to stdout.

S

send(String) - Method in class EmailService
Sends a message via email.
send(String) - Method in interface NotificationMedium
Sends a notification message through the implementing medium.
send(String) - Method in class SMSService
Sends a message via SMS.
setMedium(NotificationMedium) - Method in class AlertSystem
Sets or changes the notification medium at runtime.
SMSService - Class in Unnamed Package
Concrete implementation of NotificationMedium for SMS delivery.
SMSService() - Constructor for class SMSService
Constructs a new SMSService with default configuration.
SMSService(String, String, String) - Constructor for class SMSService
Constructs a new SMSService with custom gateway configuration.
